Who We Are

Built on Integrity, Rooted in Long Beach

Gold Coast Fence Inc. started with a simple mission: to provide Long Beach and the surrounding areas with reliable, high-quality fencing solutions. We're a family-owned business, deeply invested in the community and committed to exceeding expectations.

Our approach is straightforward. We listen to your needs, assess your property, and recommend the best fencing options for your style and budget. We believe in clear communication, transparent pricing, and meticulous workmanship.

We're proud to call Long Beach home and dedicated to giving back. We actively support local initiatives and prioritize sustainable practices, ensuring our work enhances the beauty and security of our neighborhoods for years to come.

12+ Years
800+ Projects
97% Satisfaction
GET IN TOUCH →

Our Difference

Why Choose Gold Coast Fence Inc.

Local Expertise

We understand Long Beach's unique climate and architectural styles, ensuring your fence complements your home and withstands the elements.

Durable Materials

We use only premium-grade materials designed to resist fading, warping, and damage from the California sun and occasional coastal storms.

Custom Designs

From classic wood fences to modern metal designs, we create custom solutions that perfectly match your aesthetic preferences and property needs.

Reliable Service

Our experienced team delivers on-time, professional installations with minimal disruption to your property and peace of mind.

Licensed & Insured

We are a fully licensed and insured fence contractor, providing you with complete protection and confidence in our services.

Secure Your Property Today

Client Feedback

What Our Clients Say

“

Gold Coast Fence did an amazing job installing our new redwood fence! The crew was professional, efficient, and paid attention to every detail. Our backyard feels so much more private now. Highly recommend!

Maria S. Wood Fence Installation
“

Our chain link fence was damaged during a storm, and Gold Coast Fence came out quickly to repair it. The price was fair, and the repairs were done well. Very happy with their service.

David K. Chain Link Fence Repair
“

We chose a vinyl fence for its low maintenance, and Gold Coast Fence delivered! The installation was seamless, and the fence looks fantastic. The team was friendly and professional throughout the entire process.

Jennifer L. Vinyl Fence Installation
“

Our ornamental iron gate was sticking and difficult to open. Gold Coast Fence quickly diagnosed the problem and repaired it. Now, it swings smoothly and looks great. Excellent service!

Robert B. Ornamental Iron Gate Repair
“

Gold Coast Fence replaced our old, dilapidated fence with a beautiful new cedar fence. The quality of workmanship is outstanding, and the crew was respectful of our property. We're very pleased with the results.

Susan M. Fence Replacement
“

I needed a custom gate for my unusual driveway. Gold Coast Fence designed and installed a perfect solution. Their attention to detail and commitment to customer satisfaction is impressive. I highly recommend them!

Our Portfolio

Our Recent Work

Common Questions

Frequently Asked Questions

How long will a wood fence last in Long Beach?
With proper maintenance and sealing, a wood fence can last 15-20 years in Long Beach's climate. Regular inspections and prompt repairs can extend its lifespan.
What type of wood is best for a fence in California?
Redwood and cedar are excellent choices due to their natural resistance to rot and insects. Pressure-treated pine is another durable and affordable option.
Can I paint a wood fence?
Yes, you can paint a wood fence to match your home's exterior. However, staining is often preferred as it allows the natural wood grain to show through.
